title: Remove legacy v1 crossbridge polling crate
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

## Problem

The original polling-cycle binary in `crossbridge/` predates the v2
supervisor + server + client architecture and is no longer part of the
shipped design. README explicitly calls it "legacy ... not part of the new
architecture", but it is still:

- a workspace member in `Cargo.toml`,
- built and installed by `default.nix`, and
- declared as `mainProgram = "crossbridge"` in `default.nix:29` — so
  `nix run` invokes the deprecated binary.

The v1 helper scripts `script/crossbridge-request` / `script/crossbridge-answer`
only emit v1 labels (`xb-target:`, `xb-status:open`, `xb-status:answered`)
that nothing in v2 consumes. They are still installed by `postInstall` in
`default.nix:22-23`.

Keeping the legacy crate around silently steers users to the wrong tool and
forces v2 docs/skill to keep distinguishing "legacy vs current".

## Scope

1. Remove the `crossbridge/` crate:
   - Delete the directory.
   - Drop `"crossbridge"` from `[workspace] members` in the root `Cargo.toml`.
   - Regenerate `Cargo.lock`.
2. Update `default.nix`:
   - Drop the `postInstall` lines installing `crossbridge-request` /
     `crossbridge-answer`.
   - Change `mainProgram` to one of the v2 binaries
     (`crossbridge-supervisor` is the most natural — it is what the systemd
     module wraps).
3. Delete `script/crossbridge-request` and `script/crossbridge-answer`
   (they encode the v1 label protocol; v2 uses `crossbridge-client`).
4. README cleanup:
   - Drop the "legacy" bullet under "The package installs" (`README.md:104-105`).
   - Drop the row for `crossbridge/` in the Repo layout table.
   - Remove any other references to the legacy binary or helper scripts.
5. CHANGELOG: add an `### Removed` entry under `[Unreleased]`.

## Preconditions

- The agent skill update (companion issue) should land first or in the same
  change, otherwise the skill is left pointing at scripts that no longer
  exist.

## Acceptance

- `cargo build --workspace` and `cargo test --workspace` succeed.
- `nix-build` produces a derivation whose `bin/` contains only the v2
  binaries (`crossbridge-supervisor`, `crossbridge-server`,
  `crossbridge-client`).
- `rg -i "legacy|crossbridge-request|crossbridge-answer"` returns no hits in
  user-facing files (README, skill, design docs).
- No remaining references to the v1 polling protocol in shipped code or docs.
